findings.evidence: grep hits: `mathlib/Mathlib/RingTheory/HopfAlgebra/TensorProduct.lean:73 theorem antipode_def`; `code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean:96 lemma convInv_apply`; `code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/BaseChange.lean:105 lemma baseChangePointsMulEquiv_apply_tmul`; `:113 lemma baseChangePointsMulEquiv_symm_apply`. The new proofs are exactly `simp [TensorProduct.antipode_def]` and `rw [convInv_apply, ...]`.
findings.fix: Drop these parallel simp lemmas, or justify/replace them with a more general API; proofs should use `TensorProduct.antipode_def`, `AlgHom.convInv_apply`, `baseChangePointsMulEquiv_apply_tmul`, and `baseChangePointsMulEquiv_symm_apply` directly.
findings.issue: `baseChange_antipode_tmul` and the two inverse pointwise lemmas below are specialized rewrites of existing API rather than new reusable structure.

summary: The added Hopf base-change lemmas are special-case API over existing Mathlib/TauCeti rewrite lemmas, so this PR introduces parallel names rather than reusing the available general statements.
